examples: Eritreans chose not to put up a statue of Mr. Isaias or some other famous man but of a pair of giant sandals - yes, sandals.
And the book of Isaias the prophet was delivered unto him. And as he unfolded the book, he found the place where it was written.
He has named as his (powerless) vice-president Isaias Rodriguez, an assembly member known as a conciliator.
Known as the Hellman Mansion, the home was built in 1902 for the daughter of banker Isaias W. Hellman.
Ethiopia has made it clear it distrusts President Isaias Afwerki personally, and that it would prefer to see a less aggressive Eritrean leader.
